reviews.review_title: Sci-fi Wold Building at its best!
reviews.review_description: Just picked this up on sale and although the combat may be a little dated now this is a must play. It has every VR game mechanics you would expect with stunning visuals, motion capture, facial animations and the indepth sci-fi story makes for excellent world building.

The devs are not gonna update this ever, guaranteed. They only made turarena mode update (sucks btw) because they wanted the game to be relevant for just a little longer but that was two years ago. If they actually cared they would update the game and give it better mechanics more gameplay and overall better replayability but this is just an abandoned little money sucking title. Sure it was fun, but nothing special don’t buy this game. PS-I guarantee the debts are not gonna react or comment to this review at all, just proves how much this game has been abandoned.

developer_response.body:
Hi Lirp,

Sorry to hear you think we are not involved in our games. We actually do try to keep everything updated and our focus with Hubris is mostly to keep the game in an as stable state as possible.

We are always open for feedback and deel free to hop onto our Discord if you think some things can be further improved upon.

Kind regards,

Koen

reviews.review_description: Personally I don't play many FPS games. Just not a fan of being shot at and killed as a form of enjoyment but somehow ended up playing this. Maybe because it's a sci-fi genre. Anyway over all visually good for standalone vr hardware and I thought the game improved towards the end. Satisfied I completed it.
Such a beautiful SciFi game with rich mechanics. Some locations can be tedious but the landscape and overall beauty is beyond my expectations!

I don't know the pc version but this is an overall average game: graphics are nothing special, climbing and swimming is cool although movement is not optimal, gun firing is janky with only 3 weapons with upgrades that are not that interesting, scavenging is actually finding some parts on the floor or in crates, no actual skills needed, story's kind of short and felt like it was not finished. I would recommend it only if the price goes above 60%.
A really great game - Hubris 2 please devs
Its too hard

developer_response.body: hi sorry to hear you are finding it hard to complete the game, you can always lower the difficulty in the settings menu if you want for an easier experience.

reviews.review_description: This is the best game in Quest 3 , graphics and story mode is amazing , thanks creator of this game 🎮

it has good mechanics but sometimes extremely infuriating! especcialy in this one area where you have to ride bugs i kept dying anf dying and the area before it has terrible saves but other than that its ok (p.s i rated it five stars just so its on the front page of comments)

As a 63 year old and never played computer games,Xbox ect I only started playing games after my kids got me  into VR my reflexes are not that good but I got through this game and totally enjoyed it.
The game play is a bit tricky but not impossible (for a 63 year old 😎😎) and very addictive I can recommend it and definitely worth the price.

The tutorial doesn't keep current objectives anywhere.

Can't jump, open inventory or door during mission debrief, and the officer just disappeared and then reappeared out of thin air

During the stage to put battery on the drone, if I pick the battery before the officer speaks, the battery never enters the backpack. It just disappears.

Also visual signals and feedbacks are very poorly designed - for example the placement for battery is red while some useless lights around doors are also red. And there is no feedback when I touch a door control to indicate whether it's supposed to open or not.

If this is a regular PC game I'd have deleted it at this point.

UPDATE: it gets worse and worse as the game progresses - why some cliff edges can be grabbed but others cannot? And there is no map or mission screen.

I thought it would be a slow puzzle solving game but before you know it you are blasting bad guys left right and center. I love the variety of different game plays. Running, climbing and swimming, that one was new for me. I was amazed by the enemies movement. They just don't stand still and take it, they dodge, run, chase and hide, so it doesn't become predictable. 
And it got progressively harder in a good rate. 
Hope there will be a sequel.💪👍

This is the start of what could be an amazing franchise.  They drop you right into the action without much world-building, but the visuals are gorgeous and the gameplay is fun and leverages the medium of VR superbly.  The swimming mechanic in particular is excellent, but there’s jumping, climbing, and plenty of shooting.  The campaign isn’t super long but I actually liked that as some games feel like they show you what they got and then last a little longer than they keep your interest.  The sparser story introduces some key features of this sci fi world that could easily be expanded on and fleshed out in sequels to come.  If Hubris 2 comes out it would jump straight to my cart.  Oh, and the devs did a great job with bHaptics integration as well.  Clearly they are true VR enthusiasts.  It’s not a super long action RPG with endless maps to explore but rather a tight and light, beautifully executed ride.  Strap in and enjoy!

No, it’s definitely not the most beautiful game, and it’s a fairly average shooter — the controls could be better too. But it’s a solid, well-made game with lots of mechanics and a great Metroid-like atmosphere. Compared to most games in the store, it’s actually an excellent choice to spend a couple of evenings with — especially on sale.

A great looking game, with sharp graphics and good action. You have to climb, swim and shoot. The story is simple, but interesting. The major point of this game is that you have something for the money. I've played a couples a nice game, but not well developoed. After one or Two hours of play, It's over... This game worth the price and I enjoyed playing it.

Let's hope that there will be an Hubris 2😉

This is one of the best looking standalone games I've played and as a first person puzzle game it's not bad.
     Unfortunately they decided to add combat and platforming into the mix. The controls are iffy at best with buttons randomly becoming unresponsive, and the game flat out lost my left controller on multiple occasions.
    I put up with it for awhile but when I reached the hover bike I finally called it quits. While having a save right at the sharp turn seems like a good idea the result was I would spawn in, rocket into a wall and die. My controls were constantly unresponsive and while I did make it past once out of a dozen tries the game failed to save sending me right back to the sharp turn when I died. Apparently the game decided I was too close to something, it felt like a cheap death.
    Really wish they had worked out the controls better.
Great little puzzle/shooter

The graphics are not that bad but the Campaign is to short it was only like four hours long.

If you want a exiting game with amazing graphics I would suggest that you get BEHEMOTH although it is set in a dark ages time period so the closest you can get to a gun is a bow. And it runs pretty good on a quest 2.

I totally enjoyed this game. I don’t usually go for mystery solving games but this one was really good and do-able. Couple of moments where there was just darkness which I thought unnecessary but got there. Addictive game which I completed in a day. Couldn’t put it down. There were a few glitches where I had to restart due to everything going black and no control, otherwise great. Please do another like it. Or continue the story.

I love this game it’s a lot of fun. What I don’t like about it is if ur stuck on a level and need to go back u cant. U can’t even reset it to a later start.  So I say make sure u have enough fruit for life in ur box. Because if u don’t u will have to start all the way over because u will be stuck.
This a fun but short (about 4hrs) sci-fi shooter. There are better ones out there but if you've beat those already or this is on sale its worth playing
I enjoy games like reach and arken age, but this game is my fav￼. I hope they make another one.

Great game. In my 40s and a woman who has never played shooting games and I really enjoyed this game. My only concern is when you get to the 2nd world, the last stage is one of the pure cyan canisters missing. I walked the world multiple times thinking I might have dropped it, but it is nowhere to be found, and I can't continue in the game without it. Now I have to move on to a different game, which is very disappointing

First real game played on the Quest 3. Pretty quick to feel immersed. Graphics are not bad and it was amazing just to look around. I tend to play one game till I've finished it (in the past), and managed to finish this one without getting too stuck. 
One thing I will say,  I have to play most games sitting down, doing so here, the crouch button doesn't work.

Great scifi world with some good atmosphere but little blend a sometimes can Be little Buggy. Story Is mediocre. Graphics excelent but not top. On Hard diff can be in some segments/levels challenging. Very good voiceacting. But every aspect of game feel little undevelepod. Some gadgeds/things you use ONLY one time. Wasted potential. Overall 3.4.*
Thanks for czech localization💪

Really liking it, easy enough to play for someone like me who has less skill than most with action style games. I've just started so looking forward to getting into it more. I might have lost my gun accidentally and not sure if I need to back for it or if it will appear again ! 😂  Anyway, it's great fun, definitely recommend it.
This is one of the best vr games not too challenging and not to easy

reviews.review_title: I never got into vr shooter games
reviews.review_description: This game is intensive and fun
Amazing game filled with action, exploration, and some crafting. It starts off a bit slow and then really steps it up. We are patiently waiting for a sequel.

I’m playing this game right now and have been really enjoying it. It is so much fun swimming,exploring, and battling. Well,I finished the game.   I thought I was stuck at the hoverbike, but I persisted. It was intense but totally doable.  There is a discord area where you can ask questions and Koen answers you quickly 😀 too. The game plays very smoothly, too.  If you don't have all your resources, go back to your menu and look at your loads, and you can go back a bit. I actually will be playing this game again. ❤️ 💙 💜

Its a good game amazing graphics the same creators that made split fiction which is also a amazing game its super great the only thing i wish you can change is you can see how far into the game you are made me a bit motion sick but i was fine really a great game

I love this game!  The graphics are sharp and clear and you get to swim under water in an alien world!  How cool is that?!  It's an adventure that I am taking my time enjoying.  I enjoy going back to swim around after I shoot the underwater monsters.  This is so fun.
The first vr game I finished. It's pretty good. Just some issue with the trigger, that you can through objects that you don't want to, when you try to escalate something. But in general a good game

Am an old school gamer. These new age games are not much for me. But, this game is addicting. Yes, it has some issues.  However, I find it to be challenging and very engaging. Working through water and terrain is so much fun and interactive.

reviews.review_title: Glad I Didn't Pay For This
reviews.review_description:
Graphics are horrible. Controls are worse. No idea what game the other reviewers were playing but it couldn't be this one.

The game was included in my Horizon+ subscription. So I got to try it for free. It made me want a refund for Horizon+.

I'm pretty new to VR. I bought a 3s after trying my buddy's out. I started a lot of games and couldn't quite get engaged. From the start this one had me with its sci-fi elements and story. There are a few flaws like clipping and certain things that glitch into other objects, however it doesn't take away from the game at all. I highly recommend it to scratch that nerd itch.

The absolute greatest part of this game is the graphics. The graphics are extremely detailed and sharp, close to red matter level, which is insanely impressive for a shooting game. The swimming mechanics are also a big highlight with extremely accurate and realistic feeling of motion. However, while the overall shooting mechanics are satisfying and fun, it is very a bit basic and lacking. The gun upgrade system is fun but doesn’t do much to change the overall feeling and gameplay. Enemy variety is ok but could use more variety and bosses. The ending was a bit anticlimactic and would have been so much better with an epic boss fight with many waves. Overall though, this is a great shooting game with amazing graphics and good gameplay!

I finally got to try the game thanks to Horizon+ and it's great. It feels like I'm on another planet and there's an incredible journey waiting ahead of me. The graphics are top notch, the game mechanics feel good and deep, and the story has me hooked. I would highly recommend this game.

Game is nice, als the graphics are decent. 

Controls are bad. Stuff falls out of my backpack permanently. No real description of weapons. 
In Arena mode I get no f*king gun! 
Also it stucks sometimes when loading new chapters. Some subtitles texts flow so high up that you can’t read them.

I don't write reviews, but I feel the need as this is a good game. Reminded me of Half Life alyx 2 and Red Matter 1 and 2. Not as good as them, but it has a lot of potential. Great graphics and what vr should be like for all games. Some haters on here are giving one-star reviews, and i don't agree it's anywhere near that bad. I'd recommend it as there's enough going on to stop you getting bored. As another reviewer said, it was too short, and he didn't want it to end. I agree with that as i, too, would have carried on playing. Once you upgrade your guns, life gets a lot easier, but it's fun getting there, and apart from a few bugs, it's a good game, imho.
man this game is too hard like way too hard i can't even get passed one level that's very far in the game where i'm at is super hard

reviews.review_title: Cool game! Great view! Deaf friendly!
reviews.review_description: I am very glad that there have subtitles for the deaf to read to tell me what to do...  Very impressive...
This game is really good so far only on the first mission not playing any of you are for now I'll update it when I'm ready that's good
I really enjoyed this game. The VR is really well done. The characters, level of difficulty and story/ action is perfect! I can wait for a sequel!

reviews.review_title: When Will next episode be relaxed? 😀
reviews.review_description: Enjoyed it very much, nice graphic and puzzels

I love this game! Graphics are good. Swimming, shooting, jumping, climbing! 
Not confusing but creative ideas.
Very good and a lot of fun and great graphics. I just wish there was more. Ends up and that's it.....
Glitchy, bad looking, boring combat
I absolutely love this game its very fun and a little bit of a workout even when sitting i love this game!!!!
Less said the more really, no reason to overcomplicate it, looks beautiful and quite fun to run around in.  5 stars, would definately do it again.

Just started played about 2 hours. All i can say is so far “awesome!” Visuals is nice and plays (so far) out of my mind good! Dint not expect that! I hope it stays good
5 stars from me

Just finished the story on normal. This is a great game for stand alone quest 3! Looks great/real and plays like a charm. Tbh.. the gameplay feels identical to half life alyx.

Had two memory related crashes and one soft lock behind a rock in the 'bug cave'. No biggie and was fine otherwise.

Underwater scenes were gorgeous and made me wish you would make a subnautica-like stand alone game. 

5 stars! Now.. buy it and play it :-)
Not sure why there are people giving this 1 star .  I thought it was a great game from beginning to end.

Quality of the game is very good. Enjoying the mechanics and combat aswell as the story line.

Keep it up

reviews.review_title: Good game but ready to vomit
reviews.review_description: How are you guys play the game its make me dizzy even thinking of the game
Graphics showcase from a bygone era. That’s where all the budget went, so a generic story and gameplay are all that’s left
Get it , play it. It’s so much fun!
Spoko ;)
Controlling very bad enemies stupid , one of the worst game I played it’s not fun the reviews not telling the truth I wish I can refund

Im mad at myself for sleeping on this game for so long. This game has turned out to be one of my personal favorite VR games. Decent graphics,cool environments and excellent gameplay. It has everything from swimming to climbing and shootouts. Story isn’t the greatest but definitely serviceable. It has a little bit of a crafting system and your guns are upgradable. Overall,it is an excellent game and I highly recommend it. Game should be at least 4.5 stars
When i tried downloading this game it just wouldn't download one star

Only game on quest 2 that game me motion sickness.
Bought a quest 3 hoping it helped. Nope.

I had a blast playing this game. This is one of the rare games that actually has really good graphics. Not the typical cartoon graphics that you see on quest games often, reminiscent of video games from the late 90s. ￼
Like  Half - life in VR!

The game itself is fun enough, the story, etc., but I keep falling through the floor at random places and found the gun reloading to be awkward (I don't like banging my controllers together).

If these kinds of things get fixed then it would be a much better experience.
But I got to the part where you fight the bugs under ground and it always freezes up when I get there and I can not do anything
If you like SF you need to play this game, the playing mechanics are really well done and the visuals, they are simply stunning, just for the visuals it's already worth it. Great experience.

Only reason I gave 4 stars instead of 5 is because the drone has what I like to call "the C14PTR4P problem"... it blabs too much when I get in a flow state while shooting. And between that and having to battle motion tracking to get my character to keep hold of their pistol with both hands, it makes playing the game a little frustrating

reviews.review_title: something is wrong with the details
reviews.review_description: yeah so... it might,feel perfectly fine to you but to me. there is something totally wrong And  idk what it is if any of you know what is wrong please tell me! i would really appreciate it!
When i first step on the ship and in the pod i wake up to the planets colliding outside of pod, fall, and die, please help, looks cool want to play
This is a great game, a few bugs here and there but they dont break the game. Multiplayer would be really cool!
Don't usually write reviews however having played a lot of VR games, this is the best, period. Never get tired of playing it.

This game can build your self-confidence and overall improve your character. It requires that you do uncomfortable things, but if you can overcome the obstacles that stand in your way, when it's over you'll know that you were able to do it all along, and more. 

Now what we need is a time-travel variation. Its such an obvious VR theme, and yet nobody is doing anything with that concept.

reviews.review_title: A bit boring, but i enjoyed it
reviews.review_description:
Looks good. Not too short. Combat is fun sometimes.
I feel like the sound design is a letdown. Voice acting is very unemotional. There is very little environmental sound, almost no music. No reverberation to feel the vastness or confinement. Something's bad with positional audio too, it always sounds as if the source is right next to your ear or something...
Weapons are very basic, with exception of the upgraded torpedo gun, and the batteries. Most enemies are pretty boring, no bosses. But the turrets and the shielded mines were fun to deal with. 
Liked the swimming. Climbing is a bit glitchy, i regularly had inventory items fall out while on a cliff. Walking is fine, except for sprint randomly turning off at the worst possible moments - please, just make me move fast with no need to activate it. Driving was good.
Story is ... well...okay.

Graphics are 10/10 really makes you feel like your in an alternate world. Story is very intriguing, lots of action and gunfighting. Only complaint is the spider things are disgusting and kept jump scaring me

This Game is fun.  I wish the actual game was longer. The arena mode is the best part of the game.  I wish they would add more levels to make it not the same exact thing each time.  
The graphics are amazing.  The story line is cool.  Just wish there was more to do.  Then it would be my favorite game.  MORE PLEASE lol

This game is really cool.   If you were a fan of Star Wars Tales of the galaxy edge you will like this.  More mature than that game but just as cool.All the mechanics work great including  swimming.  Has a decent story and look forward to a sequel or prequel.

I played it once on quest2 and started it again when I seen the Quest 3 update dropped and it is absolutely stunning on Q3.  It looks awesome on Q2 also.  Probably one of the best looking games outside of Red Matter 2.
I definitely recommend this 💎.

Yo cyborn , Was it fun to create enemys who make no sound at all ? 
Good music 
Good graphics 
Enemys suck

It's OK but I just tried the Arena mode which might have been a fun shooter but I HAVE NO GUN!!!  Shooters are much more fun if you can shoot back at enemies.
WHERE'S MY GUN???  I'M DISARMED!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi String Fellow,

You can press B to equip or unequip your gun. 

If that is not the case somehow that part got bugged for you which is very weird.

Please let us know if that helped or not. Then we will investigate this issue asap!

Kind regards,

Koen
